feedback.text: I would like the Digital Fairness Act to add a point to require videogame publishers to provide means to keep playing a game after they end support,this could be as simple as to provide server files so the community can host their own servers. Its highly unethical for a company to just erase a product you already bought, especially when done to boost sequel's sales. It would be amazing if you could add something that protects consumers from these practices
